scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w app
scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w app"
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w app
scripts.test:smoke:full: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:smoke:socket && npm run test:smoke:social
scripts.test:hardening: npm run test:smoke:full && npm run test:load:16
scripts.exe:win: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w app && npm run sync:app-dist && npm run exe:win -w server && npm run exe:launcher:win -w server
